name: search_web
description: Search the web for information. Opens a browser with the search query.

query.description: The search query to look up

handler_code:
def handler(args):
    import webbrowser
    q = args.get('query', '').replace(' ', '%20')
    webbrowser.open('https://duckduckgo.com/?q=' + q)
    return f'Searching for {args.get("query", "")}'
